name: Pizza Bread a La Winnie
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the bread dough completely.
2. Press the thawed dough onto a greased cookie sheet in a rectangle shape.
3. Brush part of the egg mixture over the dough.
4. Add shredded cheddar cheese and cut pepperoni down the middle of the dough.
5. Fold both sides of the dough over to enclose the toppings, pinching the edges tightly (the final shape should resemble French bread).
6. Brush the remaining egg mixture on top of the pizza bread.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown.
Makes 2 loaves.
